mnemonics.title: Six IoT Functional Blocks
mnemonics.content: **DCSMAS:** Device, Communication, Services, Management, Application, Security — Remember: "Devices Communicate So Management Applies Security"

mnemonics.title: Four Communication Models
mnemonics.content: **RPPE:** Request-Response (HTTP), Publish-Subscribe (MQTT), Push-Pull (ZeroMQ), Exclusive Pair (WebSockets) — Remember: "Requests Published, Pulls Paired"

mnemonics.title: IoT Levels 1–6
mnemonics.content: **S-C-CA-M-MC-D:** Single device → Cloud upload → Cloud + Actuator control → Multiple nodes → Multiple + Coordinator → Distributed mesh — Each level adds one new capability.

mnemonics.title: Six IoT Enabling Technologies
mnemonics.content: **WeCBECM:** WSN, Cloud, Big Data, Embedded Systems, Communication Protocols, ML/AI — Remember: "We Can Build Every Connected Machine"
